get.summary: No method-level annotation: inherits the global inlineResponseSchemas=true default, so the Widget response schema is inlined directly at the use site.
get.description:
No method-level annotation: inherits the global inlineResponseSchemas=true default, so the
 Widget response schema is inlined directly at the use site.  Widget is reached only via
 inlined paths in this service, so it never lands in components/schemas.

schema.description: Reached only through inlined RPC sites — gets fully expanded inline at every use.

get.summary: Per-method override: inline_response=false forces a $ref to components/schemas even though the global default is true.
get.description:
Per-method override: inline_response=false forces a $ref to components/schemas even though
 the global default is true.  Because of this non-inlined path, Gadget appears in components
 and the other (inlined) Gadget call sites $ref into it.

post.summary: No method-level annotation: inherits the global inlineRequestSchemas=true default, so the request body schema is inlined.
post.description:
No method-level annotation: inherits the global inlineRequestSchemas=true default, so the
 request body schema is inlined.

schema.description: Reached only through inlined RPC sites — gets fully expanded inline at every use.
Reached only through inlined RPC sites — gets fully expanded inline at every use.

post.summary: Per-method override: inline_request=false forces a $ref to components/schemas for the request body even though the global default is true.
post.description:
Per-method override: inline_request=false forces a $ref to components/schemas for the
 request body even though the global default is true.

schema.description:
Reached through at least one non-inlined RPC (GetGadget with inline_response=false),
 so it lands in components/schemas and inlined sites $ref into it.

Gadget.description:
Reached through at least one non-inlined RPC (GetGadget with inline_response=false),
 so it lands in components/schemas and inlined sites $ref into it.
